prompt: Create a clean premium Japanese tech infographic poster for Meta Quest 3, centered on a vertically stacked exploded view of a white mixed-reality headset floating in space against a soft lavender-to-blue gradient background. At the top, place the Meta logo in blue followed by a large bold black sans-serif headline reading Meta Quest 3, with a smaller Japanese tagline beneath: 「まったく新しい現実を、まったく新しい構造から。」. The central subject is a highly polished 3D product render shown as an engineering breakdown with exactly 9 numbered layers, each layer separated evenly from top to bottom and labeled with blue circular number markers on the left side from 1 to 9. The 9 visible layers are: 1) the white outer faceplate shell with three front sensor/camera openings, 2) a row of exactly 3 black tracking camera modules, 3) the main logic board with chips and a clearly visible Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor graphic at the center, 4) a pair of large pancake lens assemblies with vivid purple-blue glass reflections, 5) the black internal frame chassis with openings for optics, 6) the battery/electronics bar with glowing blue accents, 7) two white articulated side strap arms, 8) a white fabric head strap loop, 9) a black soft facial interface cushion at the bottom. Add rounded rectangular annotation boxes with thin white borders and subtle transparency on both sides, each connected by fine white leader lines to the corresponding layer. There are exactly 7 feature callout boxes total: 3 on the left and 4 on the right. Left side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2」 with a chip icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「調整可能なIPD機構」 with an optics adjustment icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「精密設計されたヘッドストラップ」 with a headset strap icon and smaller Japanese body text. Right side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「フェイスプレート」 with a simple faceplate icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「トラッキングカメラ」 with a camera icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「パンケーキレンズ」 with a dual-lens icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「高性能バッテリー」 with a battery icon and smaller Japanese body text, plus a lower-right box reading 「柔らかなフェイスインターフェース」 with a soft cushion icon and smaller Japanese body text; keep the overall visual balance elegant and symmetric. At the bottom, add a wide white rounded banner spanning most of the width. On its left side place a large bold Japanese statement in blue: 「体験は、構造から進化する。」 and below it smaller Japanese explanatory copy in black. On the right side of the banner place the blue Meta logo and the wordmark “Meta”. Use a sleek Apple-like product marketing style, ultra-sharp 3D rendering, soft studio lighting, subtle glow, precise shadows, glossy plastics, realistic materials, minimal clutter, and a high-end corporate presentation aesthetic.
